## Description

Please include a summary of the changes, the rationale behind the change, and which issue or rule implementation it addresses.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] New rule implementation
- [ ] Rule metadata updates
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (verified with `mvn spotless:check`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally (`mvn test`).
- [ ] I have verified dependency security locally (`mvn verify -Psecurity-audit` passes).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation or rule metadata files as needed.
